factors.org_discoverability: hard — mostly commercial biobanks, less PubMed presence
factors.biomarker_specificity: low — no specific biomarker filtering required

expected_failure_modes: May not find commercial biobanks (BIOMEDICA CRO, Medical Gate) through PubMed — they publish less than academic centers
Matched pair discovery requires cross-referencing donor IDs — hard without registry access
Treatment-naive filtering depends on parsing free-text treatment fields — may miss nuance
Thin data — system should honestly report scarcity, not hallucinate sources
May find valid sources NOT in AminoChain (academic cohorts, biobanks) — these are correct finds, just unverifiable against this ground truth
